KEVIN LOUIS FORREST Chief Executive Officer Bevara HPP Tolling Services WINSTON-SALEM, NC Kevin Louis Forrest’s family thrived in food service for four generations, propelling him into an entrepreneurial career defined by innovative technolo- gies and a commitment to excellence. As the chief executive officer of Bevara HPP Tolling Services, he leverages high-pressure processing (HPP) technology to enhance food safety and meet consumer demands for safe, fresh and flavorful products. Bevara HPP recently partnered with Hiperbaric, the global leader in HPP technology, to open North Carolina’s first dedicated HPP tolling facility. The new 48,000-square-foot facility will address a criti- cal service gap in the Southeast and strengthen North Carolina’s food safety infrastructure. GREGORY E. MOORE Owner K Square Law WINCHESTER, MA Gregory E. Moore is the owner of K Square Law, specializing in corporate, technology and intellectual property law. With over 50 years of legal experi- ence, he has brought about significant changes in the technology industry and the early development of computer law; in the 1980s, he assisted companies in understanding how copyright and patent laws applied to computer software. Beyond his practice, he served as counsel to the Whitehead Institute for Biomedical Research for over 30 years and supported academic projects at MIT. He earned a JD from Harvard Law School and served as the first chair of the American Bar Association’s Business Law Section’s Cyber and Technology Law Committee.
